## Type of change

- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) convention (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))

- [ ] I tested the change in-game where applicable
- [ ] I updated documentation (README / config docs) where needed
